description: Nine-run protected sequencing scan on the no-distance edge-graph control branch. The C0.6 positive-mismatch forcing schedules remain active, but the rigid graph-shell survivor kernel is replaced by a bounded-path-length weighted kernel and the motif ladder is upgraded to bi-root and two-layer motifs before adjacency-versus-weaker-kernel inconsistency is forced.
architecture_notice: This branch keeps graph size, the clustered / corridor / triad representative families, the projected-transverse sector, and the shell-weight measurement vocabulary fixed. Only the survivor kernel and motif forcing family change: the graph-shell kernel is softened to a bounded-path combinatorial kernel and single-root motifs are replaced by bi-root and two-layer injections.
baseline_notice: C0.8 keeps the corrected C0.6 positive-mismatch forcing logic and the protected topology-stability rule active, but replaces the graph-shell survivor map with a bounded-path map using hop weights 1 / (h + 1) up to a fixed hop cap, then alternates that weaker kernel against adjacency once mismatch is live.

base_seed_reference.selection_note: same frozen packet family and representative seeds used in Paper 24.1 and C0.1-C0.7

forcing_protocols.label: Noise-seeded weaker-kernel inconsistency
forcing_protocols.definition: Use the exact C0.3 incidence-noise ladder as the forcing schedule, then alternate adjacency and the weaker bounded-path survivor map once mismatch is live.

forcing_protocols.label: Bi-root motif-seeded weaker-kernel inconsistency
forcing_protocols.definition: Use the upgraded bi-root and two-layer motif ladder as the forcing schedule, then alternate adjacency and the weaker bounded-path survivor map once mismatch is live.

forcing_protocols.label: Hybrid noise plus motif weaker-kernel inconsistency
forcing_protocols.definition: At each step combine the scheduled incidence-noise perturbation with the scheduled bi-root motif injection, then alternate adjacency and the weaker bounded-path survivor map once mismatch is live.

runs.notes: Noise-seeded weaker-kernel inconsistency forcing on the clustered composite anchor.
Noise-seeded weaker-kernel inconsistency forcing on the counter-propagating corridor.
Noise-seeded weaker-kernel inconsistency forcing on the phase-ordered symmetric triad.
Bi-root motif-seeded weaker-kernel inconsistency forcing on the clustered composite anchor.
Bi-root motif-seeded weaker-kernel inconsistency forcing on the counter-propagating corridor.
Bi-root motif-seeded weaker-kernel inconsistency forcing on the phase-ordered symmetric triad.
Hybrid weaker-kernel inconsistency forcing on the clustered composite anchor.
Hybrid weaker-kernel inconsistency forcing on the counter-propagating corridor.
Hybrid weaker-kernel inconsistency forcing on the phase-ordered symmetric triad.
